    Publications

    Journal articles

    2020

    1. Modelling the impact of testing, contact tracing and household quarantine on second waves of COVID-19
      A. Aleta, D. Martín-Corral, A. Pastore y Piontti, M. Ajelli, M. Litvinova, M. Chinazzi, N. Dean, E. Halloran, I. Longini Jr, S. Merler, A. Pentland, A. Vespignani, E. Moro and Y. Moreno
      Nat Hum Behav 4, 964–971 (2020)

    2. Data-driven contact structures: From homogeneous mixing to multilayer networks
      A. Aleta, G. de Arruda and Y. Moreno
      PLOS Comput. Biol. 16(7): e1008035 (2020)

    3. Evaluation of the potential incidence of COVID-19 and effectiveness of containment measures in Spain: a data-driven approach
      A. Aleta and Y. Moreno
      BMC Med 18, 157 (2020)

    4. A data-driven assessment of early travel restrictions related to the spreading of the novel COVID-19 within mainland China
      A. Aleta, Q. Hu, J. Ye, P. Ji and Y. Moreno
      Chaos Soliton. Fract. 139, 110068 (2020)
      *Sorry for the correation!

    5. Quantifying uncertainty in a predictive model for popularity dynamics
      J. O’Brien, A. Aleta, Y. Moreno and J. Gleeson
      Phys. Rev. E 101, 062311 (2020)

    6. Centrality anomalies in complex networks as a result of model over-simplification
      L. Alves, A. Aleta, F. Rodrigues, Y. Moreno and L. Amaral
      New J. Phys. 22 013043 (2020)

    2019

    1. Directionality reduces the impact of epidemics in multilayer networks
      X. Wang, A. Aleta, D. Lu and Y. Moreno
      New J. Phys. 21 093026 (2019)

    2. Explore with caution: mapping the evolution of scientific interest in physics
      A. Aleta, S. Meloni, N. Perra and Y. Moreno
      EPJ Data Sci. 8, 27 (2019)

    3. The dynamics of collective social behavior in a crowd controlled game
      A. Aleta and Y. Moreno
      EPJ Data Sci. 8, 22 (2019)

    4. Multilayer Networks in a Nutshell
      A. Aleta and Y. Moreno
      Annu. Rev. Condens. Matter Phys. 10: 45-62 (2019)

    2018

    1. Projecting social contact matrices to different demographic structures
      S. Arregui, A. Aleta, J. Sanz and Y. Moreno
      PLOS Comput. Biol. 14(12): e1006638 (2018)

    2. Measurability of the epidemic reproduction number in data-driven contact networks
      Q. Liu, M. Ajelli, A. Aleta, S. Merler, Y. Moreno and A. Vespignani
      Proc. Natl. Acad. Sci. U.S.A. 115 (50) 12680-12685 (2018)

    2017

    1. A Multilayer perspective for the analysis of urban transportation systems
      A. Aleta, S. Meloni and Y. Moreno
      Sci. Rep. 7, 44359 (2017)

    2. Human mobility networks and persistence of rapidly mutating pathogens
      A. Aleta, A. Hisi, S. Meloni, C. Poletto, V. Colizza and Y. Moreno
      R. Soc. open sci. 4: 160914 (2017)

    2016

    1. From degree-correlated to payoff-correlated activity for an optimal resolution of social dilemmas
      A. Aleta, S. Meloni, M. Perc and Y. Moreno
      Phys. Rev. E 94, 062315 (2016)

    Techincal reports

    Effectiveness of social distancing strategies for protecting a community from a pandemic with a data-driven contact network based on census and real-world mobility data
    D. Martín-Corral, A. Aleta, A. Pentland, Y. Moreno and E. Moro
